titleStmt.title: SII 22.424: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 424. (A.R. No. 424 of 1906) TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, MĀṈŪR. AMBALAVĀṆASVĀMI TEMPLE—ON A SECOND PILLAR INSIDE THE TEMPLE TRIBH. KŌNĒRINMAIKOṆḌĀṈ—2 + 1st YEAR

summary.p: This registers an order of the king making a gift of about two vēli of land at Mānanilainallūr in Kaḷakkuḍi-nāḍu to the temple of Kulaśēkhara-Viṇṇagar-Āḻvār at Karuvānallūr alias Vikrama Pāṇḍyanallūr in the same nāḍu, at the request of (minister) Kāliṅgarāyar, to meet the expenses of worship and offerings connected with the service called the Maṉamperiyāṉ-sandi instituted in the latter's name in the temple. Kāliṅgarāyar is referred to as a native of Poṉpaṟṟi near Pullūrkuḍi in Naḍuviṟkūṟu a division of Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam. The land is said to have been hitherto a veṭṭiyāṉ jīvitam but now converted into an iṟaiyili-dēvadāna with the kārāṇmai (tenancy) right granted to the Sabhā of Māṉanilainallūr, the kaḍamai and all other dues going to the temple. The record seems to be assignable to king Māṟavarman Kulaśēkhara I.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . prasāda
ñ ceytaruḷiya tirumu
khappaṭi tribhuvaṉac
cakravatti koṉe
riṉmaiy koṇ
ṭāṉ kaḷakkuṭināṭ
ṭuk karuvānallūrā
ṉa vikkiramapāṇṭi
yanallūr śrī kulace
khara viṇṇakarāḻ
vārkoyil nampuce
yvāṉukkum śrīvaiṣṇa
varkaḷukkum Ivvāḻ
vāṟku miḻalaikkūṟ
ṟattu naṭuviṟkūṟu pu
llūṟkuṭi poṉpaṟ
ṟi Uṭaiyāṉ mo—
perumāḷāṉa Aiyya
ṉ kāliṅkarāyar ta
m perāl kaṇṭa ma
ṉamperiyāṉ sandhi
kku tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷ
ḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nima
ntaṅkaḷukku Innāṭṭu
māṉanilai nallūril
veṭṭiyāṟku jivi
tamāy pontap pā
ṭakappaṭi nilam Oṉṟe
mukkāle Orumā
vum Ivarkaḷait tavi
rntu Iraṇṭāvati
ṉetirāmāṇṭu muta
l Immāṉanilaina
llūr sabhaiyār
kku kārāṇmaiyum—
viṉiyogamum taruvatā
ṉa Accum kāriyavā
rāṭcciyum veṭṭi
pāṭṭamum pañcupili
cantuvikkirakap peṟu
m vācalpeṟum Ilā
ñciṉaip peṟum
poṉ variyum maṟṟum
Epperppaṭṭiṉavum
Uṭpaṭa tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyāy Iṟu
ppatāka Iṭappeṟa
veṇumeṉṟu Aiyya
ṉ kāliṅkarāyar nama
kkuc coṉṉamaiyi
l Ivvāḻvārkku Ai
yaṉ kāliṅkarāyar ta—
tiruppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷi
ṭṭu veṇṭum nivan
taṅkaḷukku Iṉṉāṭ
ṭu māṉanilainallūri
l veṭṭiyāṟku ji
vitamāyp po(r)nta
pāṭakappaṭi nilam O
ṉṟe mukkāle Oru mā
vum Ivarkaḷai tavir
ntu Immāṉanilaina
lūr sabhaiyāṟku
kārāṇmaiyum Iv
vāḻvāṟku kaṭamaiyu
m Antarāyamum viṉi
yogamum taruvatāṉa
Accum kāriyavārā
ṭciyum veṭṭipāṭ
ṭamum pañcupili can
tuvikkirakappeṟum
vācalpeṟum Ilā
ñciṉaippeṟum
poṉ variyu maṟṟum
Eppeṟpaṭṭaṉavum
Uṭpaṭa devadāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyāy Iṟu
ppatāka Iṭṭu variyi
lār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷ
variyum naṅkeḻviyu
m taraccoṉṉom—
kaik koṇṭu tiru
ppaṭi māṟṟuḷḷiṭ
ṭu veṇṭum nivanta
ṅkaḷ cellappaṇ
ṇi Ippaṭi candrāditya
vaṟ celvatāka kalli
lum cempilum ve
ṭṭivittu koḷka
Ivai cevvirukkai
nāṭṭu Accutavayal
Araiyaṉ vaṇṭuva
varaiyap perumāṉāṉa ku
lacekara viḻupparai
yaṉ Eḻuttu 2 yāṇ
ṭu 3 nāḷ 6 100 10 I
vai miḻalaikkūṟṟattu
vaṭapāmpāṟṟu taṇ
ṇiraṇṭakkuṭiyāṉa
taraṇiviccātiranal
lūr Aṭaikkuṭai
yāṉ tevapirāṉ
tecuṭaiya tevaṉāṉa
kāṭuveṭṭi Eḻut
tu 2 Ivai maturo
dayavaḷanāṭṭu karañai
irukkai Uḻakkuṭi mu
ttaṉ Āḷkoṇṭavi
lliyāṉa pallavarā
yaṉ Eḻut
tiṉālum
prasādañ
ceytaru
ḷittu
Ivai prasādañ ce
ytaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭi
kallil veṭṭiṉeṉ
Ivūṟ(ṟ) taccācāriyaṉ
Uṭaiyā ṉaḻakaṉāṉa
pāṇṭiya cikhāmaṇi yā
cāriyaṉ Eḻuttu 2
Ivai prasādañ ceyitaru
ḷiṉa tirumukhappaṭi kallil
veṭṭiṉeṉ Ivvūr taccācaā
riyaṉ kākuttaṉ paramaṉāṉa
Āyiratteṇva Ācāriyaṉ
Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 22.424 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
